title: antennaria neglecta var. attenuata
intro: Antennaria neglecta var. attenuata, also known as variegated woolly plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Antennaria neglecta var. attenuata can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbalism.
